ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is deployed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected by the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that generated the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time when the reading was taken */,
  "reading_data" TEXT /* Sensor reading data (in JSON format) */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for this reading */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration version used for this reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES sensor_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES sensor_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_reading_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., unit, precision) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration version used for this reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_reading_metadata_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES sensor_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_reading_metadata_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the reading */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the reading was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accelerometer_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading the data point belongs to */,
  "x_axis" REAL /* X-axis acceleration */,
  "y_axis" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration */,
  "z_axis" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accelerometer_data_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading the data point belongs to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES sensor_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES sensor_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
